title: US-Iran Standoff Escalates as Trump Weighs Strikes Amid Naval Blockade
summary: President Trump considers military strikes on Iran while tightening a naval blockade that has stopped 42 violation attempts and cost Iran over $6 billion.
contents:
# US-Iran Standoff Escalates as Trump Weighs Strikes Amid Naval Blockade

## Overview
President Trump considers military strikes on Iran while tightening a naval blockade that has stopped 42 violation attempts and cost Iran over $6 billion.

## Details
US Central Command prepared plans for a short wave of strikes, with Trump set to receive a briefing from CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper. The blockade continues after Trump rejected Iran's proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for lifting it. Sanctions have frozen over $500 million in Iranian crypto assets, causing hyperinflation and economic collapse. Iran threatens new capabilities and mocks US strategy as oil prices surge to multi-year highs.

## Location
Strait of Hormuz, Iran

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @CNN OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
US-Iran tensions, naval blockade, military strikes, Strait of Hormuz, Trump, sanctions, CENTCOM
